rows.label: qev030101_MSG0001
rows.name:
You are... the brave BLADE who saved
us! You have come at a good time, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0037
rows.name:
I wish to borrow your
strength once more, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Many of our kin were saved by you,
but three members of the Tree Clan
still remain captive to them. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0003
rows.name:
We must head to their fortress to rescue
them as soon as possible, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0004
rows.name:
To be honest, right now we lack
the strength to clash head-on
with the Cavern Clan... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0005
rows.name:
If we do not borrow the hands of
Earthlings... We cannot save even
a single life of our kin, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_JNK0010
rows.name: Encourage[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_SEL0011
rows.name: Encourage Sevvy, saying they will eventually regain the strength to fight the Cavern Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_JNK0020
rows.name: Reprimand[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_SEL0021
rows.name: Agree to help this time, but tell him they cannot rely on you forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0006
rows.name:
...You are kind, Earthling. Yes,
once our kin return, we will never
lose to the likes of them! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0007
rows.name:
...It is exactly as you say, Earthling.
But to do that, we must recover our kin
and increase our fighting strength, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Good. It seems I can safely entrust
this job to you. Now, I will tell you the
names of those I want you to find, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0009
rows.name:
The first is Oll Valdileo. He was seen
being taken to the Milligan Supply Base
in the Valley of Oblivion, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0010
rows.name:
The second is Rada Valdileo. He is Oll's
younger brother, and like his brother, it
seems he is confined in their fortress, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0011
rows.name:
The third is Uzoma Vassago.
...He is my son. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0012
rows.name:
When we fled from them, he acted as the
rearguard and helped everyone escape...
And then he was captured by them, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0013
rows.name:
I hear he is currently confined in that
infamous Bedrock Fortress. You must save
him no matter what! I beg of you! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0014
rows.name:
You wish to hear the locations of the captives?
You may ask as much as you like, zo. Whose
information do you wish to hear, da? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_JNK0030
rows.name: Oll Valdileo[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_SEL0031
rows.name: Say you wish to hear about Oll Valdileo's whereabouts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_JNK0040
rows.name: Rada Valdileo[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_SEL0041
rows.name: Say you wish to hear about Rada Valdileo's whereabouts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_JNK0050
rows.name: Uzoma Vassago[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_SEL0051
rows.name: Say you wish to hear about Uzoma Vassago's whereabouts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Oll Valdileo was seen being taken to the
Milligan Supply Base, zo. Please save him
along with his younger brother, Rada. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0016
rows.name:
I hear Rada Valdileo is confined
in the Milligan Supply Base, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0017
rows.name:
He is unusually timid for a Bias,
so I am certain he is terrified
being separated from everyone, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0018
rows.name:
I hear Uzoma is confined in the Bedrock
Fortress in the Valley of Oblivion... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0019
rows.name:
I am sorry to cause you trouble
for the sake of my son, but...
Please... rescue him safely. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Everyone has returned safely, zo.
It is all thanks to you, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Thank you. First, as the chieftain
of the Tree Clan, allow me to bestow
this treasure upon the brave one. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0022
rows.name:
I hear that not a single one of them
yielded to the threats of the Cavern
Clan. I am extremely proud, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0023
rows.name:
No matter how much those who have
degraded themselves into Growth's
lackeys try to trample us underfoot... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0024
rows.name:
They can never break our souls, which reside
together with the Great Tree and the beasts, da!
Ha ha! That is what it means to be true Bias! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Yes, [ST:playername ]... I feel something close
to us in you as well, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_JNK0060
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_SEL0061
rows.name: Empathize with the Tree Clan's way of life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_JNK0070
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_SEL0071
rows.name: Answer frankly that such a way of life is hard to understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Right, right! You are already like
family to us, da. If anything happens,
we will always come to your aid, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Nnngh... Is this the chasm between species!
But I like you. If anything happens, we
will always come to your aid, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Now only Uzoma is left! [ST:playername ], keep this
momentum up and save my son as well! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Hmm? What is the matter? Did
something happen to Uzoma? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_JNK0080
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_SEL0081
rows.name: Mumble that nothing in particular happened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_SEL0091
rows.name: Inform him that Uzoma has died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Is that so? Then hurry and go save Uzoma!
I leave it to you, zo! O brave one! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0031
rows.name:
...What!? Uzoma was killed
by the Cavern Clan!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0032
rows.name:
...I see. He did not yield to them, and
disappeared into the belly of a beast
at the end, just like a true Bias... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0034
rows.name:
We have no time to be sorrowful... zo.
To ensure Uzoma's death was not in
vain, we must become even stronger. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0035
rows.name:
And one day, we will kill those Cavern Clan
bastards, leaving not a single one alive, da. We
won't let even their women and children live, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030101_MSG0036
rows.name:
This is a token of gratitude... You have
helped us greatly. Please lend us your
strength again if anything happens. [ST:wait ]
